zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tyllesworth於1527年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親William Tyllesworth26歲，母親Joanne Pottkins26歲。她於1554年12月31日與Francis Bowyer I在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年10月30日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tyllesworth于1527年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲William Tyllesworth26岁，母亲Joanne Pottkins26岁。她于1554年12月31日与Francis Bowyer I在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年10月30日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tyllesworth was born in 1527, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, William Tyllesworth, was 26 and her mother, Joanne Pottkins, was 26. She married Francis Bowyer I on 31 December 1554, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 30 October 1606, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tyllesworth est née en 1527, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Tyllesworth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joanne Pottkins, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Bowyer I le 31 décembre 1554, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1606, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tyllesworth 1527 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Tyllesworth 26 und ihre Mutter Joanne Pottkins 26. Sie hat am 31. Dezember 1554 in London, Middlesex, England Francis Bowyer I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1606 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tyllesworth è nata il nel 1527 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, William Tyllesworth, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joanne Pottkins, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Francis Bowyer I il 31 dicembre 1554, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1606, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tyllesworthが1527年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Tyllesworthは26歳，母Joanne Pottkinsは26歳であった。1554年12月31日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでFrancis Bowyer Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年10月30日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Olave Hart Street, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 올레이브 하트 스트릿

영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.London St Mildred Poultry with St Mary C: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 미드러드 파우트리 위스 스트 메리 콜렉후르치
ko.London St Edmund the King with St Nichol: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tyllesworth(이)가 1527년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Tyllesworth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanne Pottkins(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1554년 12월 31일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Francis Bowyer I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 10월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tyllesworth nasceu em 1527, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Tyllesworth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Pottkins, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Bowyer I em 31 de dezembro de 1554, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1606, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tyllesworth родилась в 1527 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Tyllesworth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne Pottkins, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Bowyer I 31 декабря 1554 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 октября 1606 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tyllesworth nació en 1527, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Tyllesworth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joanne Pottkins, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Francis Bowyer I el 31 de diciembre de 1554, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1606, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
